# ScheduledQuery Sample

This page is generated from the checked-in sample manifest at `config/samples/apmtraces_v1beta1_scheduledquery.yaml`.

| Field | Value |
| --- | --- |
| Resource | `apmtraces/ScheduledQuery` |
| API Version | `apmtraces.oracle.com/v1beta1` |
| Source Path | `config/samples/apmtraces_v1beta1_scheduledquery.yaml` |

```yaml
#
# Copyright (c) 2021, Oracle and/or its affiliates. All rights reserved.
# Licensed under the Universal Permissive License v 1.0 as shown at http://oss.oracle.com/licenses/upl.
#

#
# Replace the APM Domain OCID below before running e2e.
# Update metadata.name or spec.scheduledQueryName if you want to force a fresh create instead of
# binding to an existing ScheduledQuery with the same apmDomainId and exact scheduledQueryName.
#
apiVersion: apmtraces.oracle.com/v1beta1
kind: ScheduledQuery
metadata:
  name: scheduledquery-sample
spec:
  apmDomainId: ocid1.apmdomain.oc1..exampleuniqueID
  scheduledQueryName: scheduled-query-sample
  scheduledQueryProcessingType: QUERY
  scheduledQueryText: 'show spans where service.name = "checkout"'
  scheduledQuerySchedule: '0 */12 * * *'
  scheduledQueryDescription: Sample scheduled query managed by OCI Service Operator
```
